nginx_sqli_querystring.notes: SQLi pattern rule should detect encoded and plain SQLi fragments only.

nginx_webshell_path_probe.notes: Webshell rule should detect suspicious shell paths and traversal probes.

nginx_404_recon_burst.notes: Recon burst rule should match only sensitive-path 404 burst above threshold.

nginx_lfi_path_traversal_probe.notes: LFI traversal rule should hit traversal payloads targeting sensitive files.

nginx_sensitive_file_access.notes: Sensitive file rule should detect direct requests to exposed config/secret paths.

nginx_scanner_user_agent.notes: Scanner user-agent rule should tag known tooling while avoiding routine browser traffic.

nginx_login_bruteforce_burst.notes: Login brute-force rule should trigger only for sustained failed auth bursts from one source.

nginx_command_injection_query.notes: Command injection rule should detect shell metacharacter payloads, not benign cmd parameters.

nginx_phpunit_eval_stdin_probe.notes: PHPUnit rule should detect direct requests to the eval-stdin exploit path only.

nginx_xss_query_probe.notes: XSS query rule should detect encoded script/event-handler probes and avoid generic search strings.
